name: wait-and-learn-spinner
displayName: Wait & Learn: Flashcards while Claude thinks
description: Turns Claude Code's thinking spinner into language flashcards. Your vocabulary appears in the thinking text while Claude generates. Free, no ads, no account.

commands.title: Wait & Learn: Enable (patch Claude Code thinking verbs)
Wait & Learn: Disable (restore Claude Code thinking verbs)

waitAndLearn.deck.description: Which language deck to show in the Claude Code thinking spinner.
